sEn: GR-3 is a large-scale VLA model excelling in generalization, efficient fine-tuning, and long-horizon dexterous tasks, surpassing state-of-the-art baselines.
sZh: GR-3 是一个大规模视觉-语言-动作模型，在泛化、高效微调以及长程灵巧任务上表现出色，超越了最先进的基线方法。
absEn: We report our recent progress towards building generalist robot policies, the development of GR-3. GR-3 is a large-scale vision-language-action (VLA) model. It showcases exceptional capabilities in generalizing to novel objects, environments, and instructions involving abstract concepts. Furthermore, it can be efficiently fine-tuned with minimal human trajectory data, enabling rapid and cost-effective adaptation to new settings. GR-3 also excels in handling long-horizon and dexterous tasks, including those requiring bi-manual manipulation and mobile movement, showcasing robust and reliable performance. These capabilities are achieved through a multi-faceted training recipe that includes co-training with web-scale vision-language data, efficient fine-tuning from human trajectory data collected via VR devices, and effective imitation learning with robot trajectory data. In addition, we introduce ByteMini, a versatile bi-manual mobile robot designed with exceptional flexibility and reliability, capable of accomplishing a wide range of tasks when integrated with GR-3. Through extensive real-world experiments, we show GR-3 surpasses the state-of-the-art baseline method, $π_0$, on a wide variety of challenging tasks. We hope GR-3 can serve as a step towards building generalist robots capable of assisting humans in daily life.
absZh: 我们报告了在构建通用机器人策略方面的最新进展，即 GR-3 的开发。GR-3 是一个大规模视觉-语言-动作（VLA）模型。它在泛化到新物体、新环境以及涉及抽象概念的指令方面展现出卓越的能力。此外，它可以通过最少的人类轨迹数据进行高效微调，从而快速且经济地适应新环境。GR-3 还擅长处理长程和灵巧任务，包括需要双臂操作和移动的任务，展现出稳健可靠的性能。这些能力是通过多方面的训练方案实现的，包括与网络规模的视觉-语言数据共同训练、通过 VR 设备收集的人类轨迹数据进行高效微调，以及利用机器人轨迹数据进行有效的模仿学习。此外，我们介绍了 ByteMini，一种多功能双臂移动机器人，具有出色的灵活性和可靠性，在与 GR-3 集成后能够完成广泛的任务。通过大量的真实世界实验，我们展示了 GR-3 在各种具有挑战性的任务上超越了最先进的基线方法 $π_0$。我们希望 GR-3 能够成为构建能够协助人类日常生活的通用机器人的一步。

It showcases exceptional capabilities in generalizing to novel objects, environments, and instructions involving abstract concepts. Furthermore, it can be efficiently fine-tuned with minimal human trajectory data, enabling rapid and cost-effective adaptation to new settings. GR-3 also excels in handling long-horizon and dexterous tasks, including those requiring bi-manual manipulation and mobile movement, showcasing robust and reliable performance. These capabilities are achieved through a multi-faceted training recipe that includes co-training with web-scale vision-language data, efficient fine-tuning from human trajectory data collected via VR devices, and effective imitation learning with robot trajectory data. In addition, we introduce ByteMini, a versatile bi-manual mobile robot designed with exceptional flexibility and reliability, capable of accomplishing a wide range of tasks when integrated with GR-3. Through extensive real-world experiments, we show GR-3 surpasses the state-of-the-art baseline method, π0\pi_{0}, on a wide variety of challenging tasks. items.en: The pursuit of intelligent generalist robots that are capable of assisting humans with daily tasks has been a long-standing goal in robotics research [10, 11, 9, 67, 7, 13, 3]. A key challenge stems from the immense diversity of the real world, requiring robot policies to possess strong generalization capabilities to handle a wide range of novel scenarios. Additionally, many daily tasks are inherently long-horizon and require complex dexterous manipulation, demanding robot policies to be highly robust and reliable.
items.zh: 追求能够协助人类完成日常任务的智能通用机器人一直是机器人研究领域的长期目标[10, 11, 9, 67, 7, 13, 3]。一个关键挑战源于真实世界的巨大多样性，要求机器人策略具备强大的泛化能力以处理各种新场景。此外，许多日常任务本质上是长时域的，需要复杂的灵巧操作，要求机器人策略具有高度的鲁棒性和可靠性。

items.en: Recent advances in Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models [11, 9, 29, 67, 37] have paved a promising path towards developing intelligent generalist robot policies. These models are built upon pre-trained vision-language models (VLMs) [4, 14, 19, 39] and integrate the action prediction capabilities, enabling robots to perform a wide range of tasks following natural language instructions. Despite these progresses, instruction following remains a significant challenge, especially for out-of-distribution instructions that involve novel object categories that are unseen in robot trajectory data and/or complex concepts that require sophisticated reasoning [49, 11]. Moreover, VLA models typically require large amounts of demonstrations for policy training, posing substantial challenges for efficient adaptation to novel settings. Finally, ensuring robustness in complex long-horizon tasks remains challenging due to accumulative errors, especially for tasks involving dexterous skills, such as manipulating deformable objects.
items.zh: 视觉-语言-动作（VLA）模型的最新进展[11, 9, 29, 67, 37]为开发智能通用机器人策略铺平了有希望的道路。这些模型基于预训练的视觉-语言模型（VLM）[4, 14, 19, 39]构建，并集成了动作预测能力，使机器人能够根据自然语言指令执行广泛的任务。尽管取得了这些进展，指令遵循仍然是一个重大挑战，特别是对于涉及机器人轨迹数据中未见过的物体类别和/或需要复杂推理的抽象概念的分布外指令[49, 11]。此外，VLA模型通常需要大量演示进行策略训练，这对高效适应新场景构成了重大挑战。最后，由于累积误差，确保复杂长时域任务的鲁棒性仍然具有挑战性，特别是对于涉及灵巧技能的任务，例如操作可变形物体。

items.capEn: Figure 1: Overview. GR-3 is able to learn from three types of data: vision-language data, robot trajectory data, and human trajectory data. It is able to perform dexterous and long-horizon tasks with exceptional robustness and generalize well to novel objects, environments, and instructions.
items.capZh: 图1：概述。GR-3能够从三种类型的数据中学习：视觉-语言数据、机器人轨迹数据和人类轨迹数据。它能够以卓越的鲁棒性执行灵巧和长时域任务，并很好地泛化到新物体、环境和指令。

items.en: In this report, we introduce GR-3, a large-scale vision-language-action (VLA) model that 1) strictly follows languages and generalizes well to novel objects, environments, and instructions, 2) efficiently learns from few-shot human trajectory data for rapid adaptation to novel settings, and 3) performs long-horizon and dexterous tasks with high robustness and reliability (Fig. 1). GR-3 takes as inputs a natural language instruction, observations from the environment, and the robot state. It outputs an action chunk to control a bi-manual mobile robot in an end-to-end manner. Specifically, GR-3 is built upon a pre-trained VLM [2] and predicts actions via flow-matching [47, 48]. We perform careful studies on model architecture, and introduce a set of well-chosen design choices, which we find crucial for instruction following capabilities and long-horizon task performance. To enhance generalization capabilities, we co-train GR-3 on robot trajectory data and large-scale vision-language data covering a wide variety of vision-language tasks. This training recipe enables GR-3 to not only handle objects from novel categories, but also understand abstract concepts relating to sizes, spatial relationships, and common-sense knowledge (Fig. 2), which are unseen within the robot trajectory data. Besides, we showcase that GR-3 can be efficiently fine-tuned with minimal human trajectory data collected via VR devices, enabling rapid and cost-effective adaptation to novel settings. Alongside GR-3, we introduce ByteMini, a versatile bi-manual mobile robot designed with high flexibility and reliability, capable of accomplishing a wide range of challenging tasks in the real world.
items.zh: 在本报告中，我们介绍GR-3，一个大规模视觉-语言-动作（VLA）模型，它能够1）严格遵循语言指令并很好地泛化到新物体、环境和指令，2）从少量人类轨迹数据中高效学习以快速适应新场景，以及3）以高鲁棒性和可靠性执行长时域和灵巧任务（图1）。GR-3以自然语言指令、环境观测和机器人状态作为输入。它输出一个动作块，以端到端的方式控制双臂移动机器人。具体来说，GR-3基于预训练的VLM [2]构建，并通过流匹配[47, 48]预测动作。我们对模型架构进行了仔细研究，并引入了一组精心选择的设计选择，我们发现这些选择对于指令遵循能力和长时域任务性能至关重要。为了增强泛化能力，我们在机器人轨迹数据和覆盖广泛视觉-语言任务的大规模视觉-语言数据上共同训练GR-3。这种训练方法使GR-3不仅能够处理新类别的物体，还能理解与大小、空间关系和常识知识相关的抽象概念（图2），这些在机器人轨迹数据中未见。此外，我们展示了GR-3可以通过VR设备收集的最少人类轨迹数据进行高效微调，从而实现快速且经济高效地适应新场景。与GR-3一起，我们介绍了ByteMini，一种具有高灵活性和可靠性的多功能双臂移动机器人，能够在真实世界中完成广泛具有挑战性的任务。

items.en: We perform extensive real-world experiments across three challenging tasks: 1) generalizable pick-and-place, 2) long-horizon table bussing, and 3) dexterous cloth manipulation. GR-3 consistently outperforms the state-of-the-art baseline, π0\pi_{0}, across all tasks. It showcases strong capabilities in generalizing to objects from novel categories and understanding complex semantics. Moreover, it efficiently adapts to novel objects with only 10 human trajectories per objects. Finally, GR-3 excels in performing long-horizon and dexterous tasks with remarkable robustness, achieving high average task progress in the challenging tasks of table bussing and cloth manipulation.
items.zh: 我们在三个具有挑战性的任务上进行了广泛的真实世界实验：1）可泛化的拾取和放置，2）长时域餐桌清理，以及3）灵巧布料操作。GR-3在所有任务上始终优于最先进的基线方法π0。它展示了在泛化到新类别物体和理解复杂语义方面的强大能力。此外，它仅通过每个物体10条人类轨迹就能高效适应新物体。最后，GR-3在长时域和灵巧任务中表现出卓越的鲁棒性，在餐桌清理和布料操作等挑战性任务中实现了高平均任务进度。

items.capEn: Figure 2: Capabilities. GR-3 strictly follows instructions and is capable of understanding unseen instructions involving abstract concepts. It performs robustly and reliably on long-horizon table bussing and dexterous cloth manipulation.
items.capZh: 图2：能力。GR-3严格遵循指令，能够理解涉及抽象概念的未见指令。它在长时域餐桌清理和灵巧布料操作中表现稳健可靠。

items.capEn: Figure 3: The GR-3 Model. GR-3 is co-trained on both robot trajectories and vision-language data with a flow-matching objective (left) and a next-token-prediction objective (right), respectively.
items.capZh: 图3：GR-3模型。GR-3分别在机器人轨迹和视觉-语言数据上共同训练，使用流匹配目标（左）和下一个词预测目标（右）。

items.en: GR-3 is an end-to-end vision-language-action (VLA) model πθ\pi_{\theta}. It controls a bi-manual robot with a mobile base by generating a kk-length action chunk 𝐚t=at:t+k\mathbf{a}_{t}=a_{t:t+k} conditioned on the input language instruction ll, observation 𝐨t\mathbf{o}_{t}, and robot state 𝐬t\mathbf{s}_{t}, i.e., 𝐚t=πθ​(l,𝐨t,𝐬t)\mathbf{a}_{t}=\pi_{\theta}(l,\mathbf{o}_{t},\mathbf{s}_{t}). GR-3 adopts the mixture-of-transformers architecture [45]. It processes the observation images from multiple camera views and the language instruction with a pre-trained vision-language model (VLM), i.e., Qwen2.5-VL-3B-Instruct [2], and predicts the action chunk with an action diffusion transformer (DiT) [56].
items.zh: GR-3是一个端到端的视觉-语言-动作（VLA）模型πθ。它通过生成一个长度为k的动作块at = at:t+k，以语言指令l、观测ot和机器人状态st为条件，控制一个带有移动底座的双臂机器人，即at = πθ(l, ot, st)。GR-3采用混合Transformer架构[45]。它使用预训练的视觉-语言模型（VLM），即Qwen2.5-VL-3B-Instruct [2]，处理来自多个相机视角的观测图像和语言指令，并使用动作扩散Transformer（DiT）[56]预测动作块。

items.en: Specifically, GR-3 employs flow matching for action prediction [9, 48, 47]. The flow prediction is conditioned on the current robot state 𝐬t\mathbf{s}_{t} and the KV cache outputted from the VLM backbone. The kk-length action chunk 𝐚t\mathbf{a}_{t} is represented as kk tokens and concatenated with the robot state token to create the input token sequence for the action DiT. The flow matching timestep is injected via the adaptive layer norm (AdaLN) [57]. We apply the causal attention mask in the action DiT to model the temporal dependency inside the action chunk. To ensure fast inference, the action DiT contains half the number of layers compared to the VLM backbone and utilizes only the KV cache from the latter half of the VLM layers. In total, GR-3 contains 4B parameters.
items.zh: 具体来说，GR-3采用流匹配进行动作预测[9, 48, 47]。流预测以当前机器人状态st和VLM主干输出的KV缓存为条件。长度为k的动作块at表示为k个token，并与机器人状态token连接，形成动作DiT的输入token序列。流匹配时间步通过自适应层归一化（AdaLN）[57]注入。我们在动作DiT中应用因果注意力掩码，以建模动作块内部的时间依赖性。为了确保快速推理，动作DiT的层数仅为VLM主干的一半，并且仅使用VLM后半部分的KV缓存。GR-3总共包含4B参数。

items.en: In our early explorations, we observed frequent instability during training. Inspired by QK norm [26], we apply additional RMSNorm [78] after the linear layers inside both attention and feed-forward networks (FFN) within the DiT blocks. This design choice drastically improves the stability across the whole training process. In addition, we found that it significantly improves the language following capability in our downstream experiments, as shown in Sec. 5.
items.zh: 在我们的早期探索中，我们观察到训练过程中频繁出现不稳定性。受QK归一化[26]的启发，我们在DiT块内的注意力机制和前馈网络（FFN）中的线性层之后应用了额外的RMSNorm [78]。这一设计选择极大地提高了整个训练过程的稳定性。此外，我们发现它在我们的下游实验中显著提高了语言遵循能力，如第5节所示。

items.en: We train the GR-3 model on a mixture of data sources, including robot trajectory data for imitation learning, web-scale vision-language data for co-training, and human trajectory data for few-shot generalization. This training recipe allows GR-3 to 1) generalize to novel objects, environments, and instructions, 2) efficiently adapt to unseen settings at a low cost, and 3) perform long-horizon and dexterous tasks robustly.
items.zh: 我们在混合数据源上训练GR-3模型，包括用于模仿学习的机器人轨迹数据、用于共同训练的网络规模视觉-语言数据，以及用于少样本泛化的人类轨迹数据。这种训练方法使GR-3能够1）泛化到新物体、环境和指令，2）以低成本高效适应未见场景，以及3）稳健地执行长时域和灵巧任务。

full.sec: 3.1 Imitation Learning with Robot Trajectory Data
full.secZh: 3.1 基于机器人轨迹数据的模仿学习

items.en: We train GR-3 with an imitation learning objective by maximizing the log-likelihood of the policy on a set of expert demonstrations 𝒟\mathcal{D}:
items.zh: 我们通过最大化策略在一组专家演示D上的对数似然，使用模仿学习目标训练GR-3：

items.en: Specifically, we supervise the action prediction with a flow-matching loss during training:
items.zh: 具体来说，我们在训练期间使用流匹配损失监督动作预测：

items.en: where τ∼𝒰​(0,1)\tau\sim\mathcal{U}\left(0,1\right) is the flow matching timestep and tt denotes the episode timestep. 𝐚tτ=(1−τ)​ϵ+τ​𝐚t\mathbf{a}_{t}^{\tau}=(1-\tau)\epsilon+\tau\mathbf{a}_{t} is the noisy action chunk where ϵ∼𝒩​(𝟎,𝐈)\epsilon\sim\mathcal{N}(\mathbf{0},\mathbf{I}) is a random noise, and 𝐮​(𝐚tτ|𝐚t)=𝐚t−ϵ\mathbf{u}(\mathbf{a}_{t}^{\tau}|\mathbf{a}_{t})=\mathbf{a}_{t}-\epsilon is the ground-truth label for flow prediction. To accelerate training, we compute the flow-matching loss on multiple sampled flow matching timesteps for one forward pass of the VLM backbone [42]. During inference, the action chunk is initialized from a random noise 𝐚tτ=0∼𝒩​(𝟎,𝐈)\mathbf{a}_{t}^{\tau=0}\sim\mathcal{N}(\mathbf{0},\mathbf{I}) and integrated from τ=0\tau=0 to τ=1\tau=1 with the Euler method, i.e., 𝐚tτ+Δ​τ=𝐚tτ+𝐯θ​(l,𝐨t,𝐬t,𝐚tτ)​Δ​τ\mathbf{a}_{t}^{\tau+\Delta\tau}=\mathbf{a}_{t}^{\tau}+\mathbf{v}_{\theta}(l,\mathbf{o}_{t},\mathbf{s}_{t},\mathbf{a}_{t}^{\tau})\Delta\tau. We set Δ​τ=0.2\Delta\tau=0.2 in the experiment.
items.zh: 其中τ ~ U(0,1)是流匹配时间步，t表示情节时间步。at^τ = (1-τ)ϵ + τ at是带噪声的动作块，其中ϵ ~ N(0, I)是随机噪声，u(at^τ | at) = at - ϵ是流预测的真实标签。为了加速训练，我们在VLM主干的一次前向传播中计算多个采样流匹配时间步上的流匹配损失[42]。在推理期间，动作块从随机噪声at^τ=0 ~ N(0, I)初始化，并使用欧拉方法从τ=0积分到τ=1，即at^τ+Δτ = at^τ + vθ(l, ot, st, at^τ) Δτ。我们在实验中设置Δτ=0.2。

items.en: We collect real robot trajectories with teleoperation. To make the collection process more controllable and maximize the data diversity, we develop a data collection scheduler (Fig. 4) to inform teleoperators with 1) the action to perform, 2) the object combination, and 3) the background setting. At the beginning of each trajectory collection, the system generates a new configuration for the teleoperator to arrange the environment accordingly. The implementation of the scheduler enables us to effectively manage the overall data distribution and thoroughly randomize the collected data, greatly enhancing the richness and variability of the dataset. In addition, post-collection quality checks are conducted to refine the dataset by filtering out invalid and low-quality data.
items.zh: 我们通过遥操作收集真实机器人轨迹。为了使收集过程更可控并最大化数据多样性，我们开发了一个数据收集调度器（图4），向遥操作员提供以下信息：1）要执行的动作，2）物体组合，以及3）背景设置。在每条轨迹收集开始时，系统生成一个新的配置，供遥操作员相应地安排环境。调度器的实现使我们能够有效管理整体数据分布并彻底随机化收集的数据，大大增强了数据集的丰富性和变异性。此外，收集后执行质量检查，通过过滤无效和低质量数据来优化数据集。

items.en: Previous work [38] indicates that policies can take advantage of spurious correlations from multiple viewpoints in action prediction instead of properly attending to the language condition. To address this issue, we incorporate a “task status” as an additional action dimension for auxiliary supervision. The task status can be one of the following: Ongoing (0), Terminated (1), Invalid (-1). The Ongoing status indicates that the robot is in progress with the task, while the Terminated status signifies that the robot has successfully completed the task. The Invalid status indicates that the given instruction is invalid given the current observation. For example, if there are no knives on the table, “put the knife into the woven basket” is considered invalid. During training, we randomly replace the language instruction with an invalid instruction, and train the model to predict the Invalid status without supervision on the other dimensions of the action chunk. This design forces the action DiT to attend to the language instruction and estimate the task status, substantially improving the language following capabilities, as shown in Sec. 5.2.
items.zh: 先前的工作[38]表明，策略可能会利用多个视角的虚假相关性进行动作预测，而不是正确关注语言条件。为了解决这个问题，我们引入了一个“任务状态”作为额外的动作维度进行辅助监督。任务状态可以是以下之一：进行中（0）、已终止（1）、无效（-1）。进行中状态表示机器人正在执行任务，而已终止状态表示机器人已成功完成任务。无效状态表示给定指令在当前观测下无效。例如，如果桌子上没有刀，则“将刀放入编织篮”被视为无效。在训练期间，我们随机用无效指令替换语言指令，并训练模型预测无效状态，而不对其他动作维度进行监督。这种设计迫使动作DiT关注语言指令并估计任务状态，从而显著提高了语言遵循能力，如第5.2节所示。

items.capEn: Figure 4: The GR-3 Data. We leverage three types of data during training: robot trajectory data (top), human trajectory data (middle), and vision-language data (bottom).
items.capZh: 图4：GR-3数据。我们在训练期间利用三种类型的数据：机器人轨迹数据（顶部）、人类轨迹数据（中部）和视觉-语言数据（底部）。

full.secZh: 3.2 与视觉语言数据的协同训练

items.en: To endow GR-3 with the generalization capabilities to follow out-of-distribution (OOD) instructions, we jointly train GR-3 on both robot trajectories and vision-language data (Fig. 3) [11]. The robot trajectory data trains both the VLM backbone and the action DiT with the flow-matching objective. The vision-language data trains only the VLM backbone with the next-token-prediction objective. For simplicity, we dynamically mix vision-language data with robot trajectories across mini-batches with equal weights. As a result, the co-training objective is the sum of the next-token-prediction loss and the flow-matching loss.
items.zh: 为了使GR-3具备遵循分布外指令的泛化能力，我们在机器人轨迹数据和视觉-语言数据上联合训练GR-3（图3）[11]。机器人轨迹数据通过流匹配目标训练VLM骨干网络和动作DiT。视觉-语言数据仅通过下一个词预测目标训练VLM骨干网络。为简化起见，我们在小批量中动态混合视觉-语言数据和机器人轨迹数据，权重相等。因此，联合训练目标是下一个词预测损失和流匹配损失之和。

items.en: Through co-training with vision-language data, GR-3 is able to effectively generalize to unseen objects and understand novel semantics of complex concept in a zero-shot manner. We curate a large vision-language dataset from a mixture of data sources [25, 39, 30, 62, 75]. This curated dataset covers a wide range of tasks (Fig. 4), including image captioning, visual question answering, image grounding, and interleaved grounded image captioning. We also develop a filtering and re-annotation pipeline to improve the quality of the dataset for effective co-training. The co-training not only helps GR-3 maintain the strong vision-language capabilities from the pre-trained VLM, but also enables the action DiT to leverage these capabilities in action prediction, effectively improving the generalization capabilities in downstream manipulation tasks.
items.zh: 通过与视觉-语言数据的联合训练，GR-3能够以零样本方式有效泛化到未见过的物体，并理解复杂概念的新语义。我们从多个数据源[25, 39, 30, 62, 75]中整理了一个大型视觉-语言数据集。该整理后的数据集涵盖了广泛的任务（图4），包括图像描述、视觉问答、图像定位和交错式定位图像描述。我们还开发了一个过滤和重新标注流程，以提高数据集的质量，从而实现有效的联合训练。联合训练不仅帮助GR-3保持预训练VLM强大的视觉-语言能力，还使动作DiT能够利用这些能力进行动作预测，有效提升了下游操作任务中的泛化能力。

full.sec: 3.3 Few-Shot Generalization with Human Trajectory Data
full.secZh: 3.3 基于人类轨迹数据的少样本泛化

items.en: GR-3 is a versatile VLA model that can be easily fine-tuned to adapt to novel settings. However, collecting real-robot trajectories is both time-consuming and costly. Recent advances in VR devices and hand tracking technology create a promising opportunity to learn actions directly from human trajectory data [34, 59, 27]. In this report, we extend the efficient fine-tuning capabilities of GR-3 to the challenging setting of few-shot learning from minimal human trajectories. Specifically, given a novel setting, we collect a small amount of human trajectory data with PICO 4 Ultra Enterprise. Human trajectories can be efficiently collected with VR devices at a rate of approximately 450 trajectories per hour, substantially outpacing the teleoperated robot trajectory collection, which collects about 250 trajectories per hour. This efficiency facilitates rapid and cost-effective adaptation to novel settings.
items.zh: GR-3是一个多功能的VLA模型，可以轻松微调以适应新场景。然而，收集真实机器人轨迹既耗时又昂贵。近期VR设备和手部跟踪技术的进步为直接从人类轨迹数据学习动作创造了有前景的机会[34, 59, 27]。在本报告中，我们将GR-3的高效微调能力扩展到从最少人类轨迹进行少样本学习的挑战性场景。具体来说，针对新场景，我们使用PICO 4 Ultra Enterprise收集少量人类轨迹数据。使用VR设备可以高效收集人类轨迹，速率约为每小时450条轨迹，远超遥操作机器人轨迹收集（约每小时250条轨迹）。这种效率促进了快速且经济地适应新场景。

items.en: Concretely, the collected human trajectory data contains egocentric videos and human hand trajectories. We use the same labeling pipeline for robot trajectories to label human trajectory data with languages. After completing the first stage of training with vision-language data and robot trajectories, we incorporate the human trajectory data and perform co-training on all three types of data. Unlike robot trajectories, human trajectory data contains only an egocentric view and hand trajectories without arm joint states or gripper states. We consequently pad blank images for the missing wrist views and train the model with only the hand trajectory for human trajectory data.
items.zh: 具体来说，收集到的人类轨迹数据包含第一人称视频和人类手部轨迹。我们使用与机器人轨迹相同的标注流程来标注人类轨迹数据的语言。在完成第一阶段的视觉-语言数据和机器人轨迹训练后，我们加入人类轨迹数据，并对所有三种数据类型进行联合训练。与机器人轨迹不同，人类轨迹数据仅包含第一人称视角和手部轨迹，没有手臂关节状态或夹爪状态。因此，我们为缺失的手腕视图填充空白图像，并仅使用手部轨迹训练人类轨迹数据模型。

items.en: The ByteMini robot (Fig. 5) is deployed for data collection and policy rollout. This 22-DoF bi-manual mobile robot is specifically designed with three core objectives: flexible manipulation, high reliability, and user-friendliness.
items.zh: ByteMini机器人（图5）用于数据收集和策略部署。这款22自由度双臂移动机器人专门设计，具有三个核心目标：灵活操作、高可靠性和用户友好性。

items.en: The 7-DoF unbiased robotic arm, featuring a unique sphere wrist joint configuration [22], achieves human-like dexterity. The compact sphere wrist design (Fig. 5) overcomes the critical limitation of traditional SRS-configured arms [54], whose non-compact wrist dimensions hinder flexible operation in confined spaces. The arm elbow is specifically engineered to allow large internal adduction to 2.53 rad, enabling the two arms to execute delicate operations within the area of the robot chest.
items.zh: 7自由度无偏置机械臂采用独特的球腕关节配置[22]，实现了类人灵巧性。紧凑的球腕设计（图5）克服了传统SRS配置手臂[54]的关键限制，其非紧凑的腕部尺寸阻碍了在狭小空间中的灵活操作。手臂肘部经过专门设计，允许大幅内收至2.53弧度，使双臂能够在机器人胸部区域内执行精细操作。

items.en: The demanding workload during data collection and policy rollout requires ByteMini to possess extremely high stability and consistency. We leverage an omni mobile platform integrated with a lift mechanism to achieve spatial mobility and vertical height adjustment stably. To further enhance reliability and ensure motion consistency, the actuators in the arms are designed based on the Quasi Direct Drive (QDD) principle [35], which is well-known for its stability and high transparency.
items.zh: 数据收集和策略部署期间的高强度工作负载要求ByteMini具有极高的稳定性和一致性。我们利用集成升降机构的全向移动平台，稳定实现空间移动和垂直高度调整。为进一步增强可靠性并确保运动一致性，手臂中的执行器基于准直驱原理[35]设计，该原理以其稳定性和高透明度而闻名。

items.en: To improve usability, we integrate a portable screen and an NUC on the robot, supported by a dual-lithium battery that delivers extended endurance of over 10 hours across diverse scenarios. Additionally, ByteMini is equipped with a wireless E-stop, enabling rapid response to critical situations.
items.zh: 为提高可用性，我们在机器人上集成了便携式屏幕和NUC，由双锂电池供电，在不同场景下可提供超过10小时的持久续航。此外，ByteMini配备了无线急停开关，能够快速响应紧急情况。

items.en: We mount RGBD cameras on the head and the two wrists. The wrist cameras enable close-up observation for fine manipulation.
items.zh: 我们在头部和两个手腕上安装了RGBD摄像头。手腕摄像头可实现近距离观察，用于精细操作。

items.capEn: Figure 5: The ByteMini Robot. We show the robot specifications, multi-camera views, and motion range of the unique wrist sphere joint.
items.capZh: 图5：ByteMini机器人。我们展示了机器人规格、多摄像头视图以及独特腕部球关节的运动范围。

items.en: A whole-body compliance control framework [65] treats all degrees of freedom (DoFs) as a holistic structure to retarget arbitrary teleoperated human motion to feasible robot motion. Manipulability optimization, singularity avoidance, and physical joint limits are simultaneously addressed within a real-time optimal control problem to maximize robot dexterity. This generates fluid and continuous motion across large workspaces for diverse long-horizon manipulation tasks, producing high-quality expert trajectories for policy training. The compliant force controller enables highly dynamic motion and physical interaction with the environment, enhancing safety and data collection efficiency.
items.zh: 全身柔顺控制框架[65]将所有自由度视为一个整体结构，将任意遥操作人体运动重定向为可行的机器人运动。在实时最优控制问题中同时处理可操作性优化、奇异性避免和物理关节限制，以最大化机器人灵巧性。这在大工作空间中为各种长时程操作任务生成流畅连续的运动，产生高质量的策略训练专家轨迹。柔顺力控制器实现了高动态运动和与环境的物理交互，增强了安全性和数据收集效率。

items.en: During teleoperated data collection, whole-body retargetting via Meta VR Quest provides intuitive and user-friendly control to directly map human motions to robot end-effectors. Teleoperators can simultaneously control arm, lift mechanism, gripper, and mobile base movements, facilitating seamless data collection for complex long-horizon tasks in the real world.
items.zh: 在遥操作数据收集过程中，通过Meta VR Quest进行全身重定向，提供直观且用户友好的控制，直接将人体运动映射到机器人末端执行器。遥操作员可以同时控制手臂、升降机构、夹爪和移动底座的运动，促进在现实世界中复杂长时程任务的无缝数据收集。

items.en: Trajectory optimization for policy rollout. We use the predicted action chunk to control 19 DoFs of the robot (excluding the 3 DoFs from the lift mechanism and head) for policy rollout. We incorporate pure pursuit [15] and trajectory optimization to enhance the stability and smoothness of the trajectories generated by GR-3 during policy rollout. The real-time parameterized optimization minimizes jerk and ensures seamless transition between waypoints and across trajectories.
items.zh: 策略部署的轨迹优化。我们使用预测的动作块来控制机器人的19个自由度（不包括升降机构和头部的3个自由度）进行策略部署。我们结合纯追踪[15]和轨迹优化，以增强GR-3在策略部署期间生成轨迹的稳定性和平滑性。实时参数化优化最小化加加速度，并确保航路点之间以及轨迹之间的无缝过渡。

items.en: We conduct extensive real-world experiments to comprehensively evaluate the performance of GR-3. Throughout experiments, we aim to answer four questions:
items.zh: 我们进行了广泛的真实世界实验，以全面评估GR-3的性能。在整个实验中，我们旨在回答四个问题：

items.en: Does GR-3 strictly follow instructions, including those that are unseen during training?
items.zh: GR-3是否严格遵循指令，包括训练中未见过的指令？

items.en: Can GR-3 generalize to out-of-distribution settings, including novel objects, environments, and instructions?
items.zh: GR-3能否泛化到分布外场景，包括新物体、新环境和新指令？

items.en: Is GR-3 capable of performing few-shot learning from human trajectory data and transfer to the robot embodiment?
items.zh: GR-3是否能够从人类轨迹数据中进行少样本学习并迁移到机器人具身？

items.en: Can GR-3 effectively learn a robust policy capable of performing long-horizon and dexterous task?
items.zh: GR-3能否有效学习一个稳健的策略，以执行长时程和灵巧任务？

items.en: We consider three tasks: generalizable pick-and-place, long-horizon table bussing, and dexterous cloth hanging. Please visit the project page for video demos. We compare our method with the state-of-the-art method π0\pi_{0} [9]. We follow the instruction in the official GitHub repository111https://github.com/Physical-Intelligence/openpi and fine-tune π0\pi_{0} from the provided base model, which is pre-trained on large-scale robot data, for each of the three tasks individually.
items.zh: 我们考虑三个任务：可泛化拾取与放置、长时程餐桌清理和灵巧挂布。请访问项目页面查看视频演示。我们将我们的方法与最先进方法π0 [9]进行比较。我们按照官方GitHub仓库¹¹¹https://github.com/Physical-Intelligence/openpi中的说明，从提供的基座模型（在大规模机器人数据上预训练）中微调π0，分别针对三个任务进行单独微调。

items.capEn: Figure 6: Experiment Settings of Generalizable Pick-and-Place. (a) Test objects that are seen during training. (b) Test objects that are unseen during training. (c) The Basic environment is seen during training. The others are out-of-distribution environments that are unseen during training.
items.capZh: 图6：可泛化拾取与放置的实验设置。(a) 训练中见过的测试物体。(b) 训练中未见过的测试物体。(c) 基础环境在训练中见过。其他是训练中未见过的分布外环境。

items.en: To assess the generalization capabilities of GR-3 in out-of-distribution settings, we evaluate on a generalization-focused pick-and-place task. In total, we collected 35k robot trajectories covering 101 objects, accounting for a total of 69 hours for this task. We annotate the robot trajectories with the “put A into B” instruction, where A is the object category and B is the container. For the baseline model, we fine-tune π0\pi_{0} with these robot trajectory data. For GR-3, we co-train the model with both the robot trajectory data and vision-language data. During training, we augment the images of the robot trajectories with photometric augmentations to improve the robustness against the changing environment. We also compare with a variant of our method, GR-3 w/o Co-Training, which trains the model with only robot trajectories. This ablation study helps us evaluate the impact of vision-language co-training and identify the specific benefits it contributes to the model performance.
items.zh: 为了评估GR-3在分布外场景下的泛化能力，我们在一个专注于泛化的抓取-放置任务上进行评估。我们总共收集了涵盖101个物体的35k条机器人轨迹，该任务总计耗时69小时。我们为机器人轨迹标注了“将A放入B”的指令，其中A是物体类别，B是容器。对于基线模型，我们使用这些机器人轨迹数据对π0进行微调。对于GR-3，我们同时使用机器人轨迹数据和视觉-语言数据对模型进行联合训练。在训练过程中，我们对机器人轨迹的图像进行光度增强，以提高对变化环境的鲁棒性。我们还与GR-3的一个变体（GR-3 w/o Co-Training）进行比较，该变体仅使用机器人轨迹训练模型。这项消融研究有助于我们评估视觉-语言联合训练的影响，并确定其对模型性能的具体贡献。

items.en: We evaluate under four different settings: 1) Basic, 2) Unseen Environments, 3) Unseen Instructions, and 4) Unseen Objects. In Basic, we evaluate in an environment that is seen during training. We evaluate with 54 objects that are seen during training (Fig. 6(a)) to test the basic instruction following capabilities. In Unseen Environments, we evaluate with the same set of objects in four different real world environments that are unseen during training: a checkout counter, a meeting room, a desk, and a break room (Fig. 6(c)). The layouts of objects are kept consistent with the Basic setting. In Unseen Instructions, we prompt the model with instructions requiring complex concept understanding, e.g., “put the left coke into the carton” and “put the animal with tentacles into the carton”. In Unseen Objects, we evaluate using 45 objects that are unseen in the robot trajectory data (Fig. 6(b)).
items.zh: 我们在四种不同设置下进行评估：1）基础，2）未见环境，3）未见指令，4）未见物体。在基础设置中，我们在训练时见过的环境中进行评估。我们使用训练时见过的54个物体（图6(a)）进行测试，以评估基本的指令跟随能力。在未见环境设置中，我们使用相同的物体集在四个未见过的真实世界环境中进行评估：收银台、会议室、办公桌和休息室（图6(c)）。物体的布局与基础设置保持一致。在未见指令设置中，我们使用需要复杂概念理解的指令提示模型，例如“将左边的可乐放入纸箱”和“将带有触手的动物放入纸箱”。在未见物体设置中，我们使用机器人轨迹数据中未见的45个物体进行评估（图6(b)）。

items.en: We assess the model performance with the instruction following (IF) rate and the success rate, which measure the ability of the model to follow instructions and its overall performance on task completion, respectively. For the IF rate, a trial is considered successful if the robot correctly approaches the object specified by the given instruction. For the success rate, a trial is considered successful if the robot puts the target object into the container. For both metrics, a higher score reflects a stronger capability.
items.zh: 我们使用指令跟随（IF）率和成功率来评估模型性能，分别衡量模型遵循指令的能力和完成任务的整体表现。对于IF率，如果机器人正确接近给定指令指定的物体，则试验视为成功。对于成功率，如果机器人将目标物体放入容器中，则试验视为成功。对于这两个指标，分数越高表示能力越强。

items.capEn: Figure 7: Experiment Results of Generalizable Pick-and-Place. (a) Results on generalizable pick-and-place under four different settings. (b) Results on few-shot generalization with human trajectories.
items.capZh: 图7：可泛化抓取-放置的实验结果。(a) 四种不同设置下的可泛化抓取-放置结果。(b) 使用人类轨迹的少样本泛化结果。

items.en: In Basic and Unseen Environments, we split the 54 seen objects into nine mini-batches with six objects per batch. In each rollout, we prompt the model to pick one object from all the six objects according to the given instruction. To guarantee the comparability of results across different models, we position the objects according to a pre-captured mask, ensuring that the object layout of a mini-batch remains as consistent as possible during evaluation.
items.zh: 在基础和未见环境设置中，我们将54个见过的物体分成九个小批次，每批六个物体。在每次执行中，我们提示模型根据给定指令从所有六个物体中选择一个物体。为了保证不同模型结果的可比性，我们根据预先捕获的掩码定位物体，确保小批次的物体布局在评估过程中尽可能一致。

items.en: As shown in Fig. 7(a), GR-3 surpasses π0\pi_{0} in both Basic and Unseen Environments in terms of the IF rate and success rate. The modest performance degradation between Basic and Unseen Environments highlights the robustness of GR-3 against environment changes. Additionally, we observe no significant performance differences between GR-3 and GR-3 w/o Co-Training in these two settings, suggesting that co-training does not impact the model performance on seen objects.
items.zh: 如图7(a)所示，在基础和未见环境设置中，GR-3在IF率和成功率方面均优于π0。基础设置和未见环境设置之间的性能适度下降凸显了GR-3对环境变化的鲁棒性。此外，我们观察到在这两种设置中，GR-3和GR-3 w/o Co-Training之间没有显著的性能差异，这表明联合训练不影响模型在见过物体上的性能。

items.en: In Unseen Instructions, we aim to test the capabilities to understand abstract concepts relating to sizes, spatial relationships, and common-sense knowledge. Example instructions include “put the coke next to the sprite into the carton”, “put the largest object into the carton”, and “put the marine animal into the carton”. These instructions are unseen in the robot trajectory data and require the model to reason the complex semantic in the instructions. In Unseen Objects, we split the 45 unseen objects into nine mini-batches with five objects per batch, i.e., the model needs to select one object from five objects per rollout. This setting is particularly challenging as among the 45 objects, more than 70%70\% of them are from categories that are unseen in the robot trajectory data.
items.zh: 在未见指令设置中，我们旨在测试理解与大小、空间关系和常识相关的抽象概念的能力。示例指令包括“将雪碧旁边的可乐放入纸箱”、“将最大的物体放入纸箱”和“将海洋动物放入纸箱”。这些指令在机器人轨迹数据中未见，要求模型推理指令中的复杂语义。在未见物体设置中，我们将45个未见物体分成九个小批次，每批五个物体，即模型每次执行需要从五个物体中选择一个。这个设置特别具有挑战性，因为在45个物体中，超过70%的物体类别在机器人轨迹数据中未见。

items.en: As shown in Fig. 7(a), GR-3 surpasses π0\pi_{0} in both settings by a large margin, highlighting its superior generalization capabilities. It boosts the success rate from 40% to 77.1% in Unseen Instructions and from 40% to 57.8% in Unseen Objects. GR-3 also substantially outperforms GR-3 w/o Co-Training in both settings, indicating that co-training with vision-language (VL) data contributes to the strong generalization capabilities. The VLA model effectively transfers rich knowledge from large-scale VL data into policy learning and enables powerful zero-shot capabilities in novel settings. We also observe that training GR-3 with only robot trajectories yields an inferior performance compared to the π0\pi_{0} baseline. We hypothesize that the performance superiority of π0\pi_{0} stems from its large-scale cross-embodiment pre-training [9].
items.zh: 如图7(a)所示，GR-3在这两种设置中均大幅超越π0，凸显了其卓越的泛化能力。它在未见指令设置中将成功率从40%提升到77.1%，在未见物体设置中将成功率从40%提升到57.8%。GR-3在这两种设置中也显著优于GR-3 w/o Co-Training，表明与视觉-语言（VL）数据的联合训练有助于强大的泛化能力。VLA模型有效地将大规模VL数据中的丰富知识迁移到策略学习中，并在新场景中实现了强大的零样本能力。我们还观察到，仅使用机器人轨迹训练GR-3的性能低于π0基线。我们假设π0的性能优势源于其大规模跨具身预训练[9]。

items.en: We also evaluate the few-shot generalization capabilities [71, 31] with human trajectories collected with VR devices. This is challenging for the reason that 1) the model needs to learn from cross-embodiment data and 2) the data is scarce. Specifically, we collected up to 10 human trajectories per object for the 45 unseen objects in the setting of Unseen Objects (Fig. 6(b)). The overall duration of the 450 human trajectories is about 30 minutes. We incrementally train GR-3 based on the checkpoint trained with robot trajectories and VL data. We perform co-training for an additional 20k steps by further incorporating human trajectory data alongside the robot trajectories and VL data.
items.zh: 我们还使用VR设备收集的人类轨迹评估了少样本泛化能力[71, 31]。这具有挑战性，原因在于：1）模型需要从跨具身数据中学习，2）数据稀缺。具体来说，我们为未见物体设置中的45个未见物体每个收集了最多10条人类轨迹（图6(b)）。450条人类轨迹的总时长约为30分钟。我们在使用机器人轨迹和VL数据训练的检查点基础上增量训练GR-3。我们通过进一步将人类轨迹数据与机器人轨迹和VL数据结合，额外进行20k步的联合训练。

items.en: We evaluate the performance under different few-shot settings (1-, 5-, and 10-shot) on both seen and unseen objects (Fig. 7(b)). Comparing to the zero-shot performance of the base model, we are able to continue improving the IF rate and success rate with more human trajectory data on unseen objects and boost the success rate from 57.8% to 86.7% with only 10 human trajectories per object. Additionally, we notice that there is no evident performance drop on seen objects, indicating a promising sample-efficient and cost-effective fine-tuning strategy to adapt pre-trained VLA models to downstream novel settings.
items.zh: 我们在不同少样本设置（1-shot、5-shot和10-shot）下评估了在见过和未见物体上的性能（图7(b)）。与基础模型的零样本性能相比，我们能够通过更多未见物体的人类轨迹数据持续提高IF率和成功率，并且仅使用每个物体10条人类轨迹就将成功率从57.8%提升到86.7%。此外，我们注意到在见过物体上没有明显的性能下降，这表明这是一种有前景的样本高效且成本效益高的微调策略，用于将预训练的VLA模型适应下游新场景。

items.capEn: Figure 8: Experiment Settings & Results of Table Bussing. (a) Flat: the robot is required to perform long-horizon table bussing in a single run. (b) Instruction following (IF): the robot is prompted with multiple sub-task descriptions in a roll. (c) Test objects. (d) Results on the flat and instruction following (IF) settings.
items.capZh: 图8：餐桌清理的实验设置与结果。(a) 平坦设置：机器人需要在单次运行中完成长时程餐桌清理。(b) 指令跟随（IF）：机器人被连续提示多个子任务描述。(c) 测试物体。(d) 平坦设置和指令跟随（IF）设置的结果。

items.en: We perform experiments on a table bussing task to evaluate the robustness of GR-3 on handling long-horizon manipulation (Fig. 8). In this task, the robot is required to clean up a table with messy utensils, food, to-go box, and a plastic bussing box. To complete the task, the robot needs to 1) pack the food into the to-go box, 2) put all the utensils into the bussing box, and 3) put all the trash into the rubbish bin. Given the large workspace, the robot needs to move its mobile base from the to-go box to the bussing box to accomplish the whole task (Fig. 8(a)). We evaluate the models in a flat setting and an instruction-following (IF) setting.
items.zh: 我们在餐桌清理任务上进行实验，以评估GR-3在处理长时程操作方面的鲁棒性（图8）。在此任务中，机器人需要清理一张堆满杂乱餐具、食物、外卖盒和塑料清理箱的桌子。为了完成任务，机器人需要：1）将食物打包进外卖盒，2）将所有餐具放入清理箱，3）将所有垃圾放入垃圾桶。由于工作空间较大，机器人需要移动其移动基座，从外卖盒处移动到清理箱处以完成整个任务（图8(a)）。我们在平坦设置和指令跟随（IF）设置中评估模型。

items.en: In this setting, we prompt the robot with a general task instruction, “clean up the dining table”, to complete the entire task autonomously within a single run (Fig. 8(a)). The flat setting helps us evaluate the robustness of the model on handling long-horizon tasks. We use the average task progress, which calculates the ratio of successfully completed sub-tasks to the total number of sub-tasks, as the evaluation metric. A value of 1.0 indicates complete success and a fractional value corresponds to partial success. In total, we evaluate on five different sets of objects for this setting.
items.zh: 在此设置中，我们使用通用任务指令“清理餐桌”提示机器人，使其在单次运行中自主完成整个任务（图8(a)）。平坦设置有助于我们评估模型处理长时程任务的鲁棒性。我们使用平均任务进度作为评估指标，该指标计算成功完成的子任务数量与子任务总数的比率。值为1.0表示完全成功，分数值表示部分成功。在此设置中，我们总共评估了五组不同的物体。

items.en: In this setting, we further evaluate how the model follows instructions. We prompt the robot with multiple sub-task descriptions in a roll, e.g., “put the paper cup into the rubbish bin”, to clean up the table. The robot performs each sub-task starting from a home position. We use the average sub-task success rate as the evaluation metric. In total, the IF setting covers six different sets of instructions (Fig. 8(b)):
items.zh: 在此设置中，我们进一步评估模型如何遵循指令。我们连续提示机器人多个子任务描述，例如“将纸杯放入垃圾桶”，以清理桌子。机器人从起始位置开始执行每个子任务。我们使用平均子任务成功率作为评估指标。总共，IF设置涵盖了六组不同的指令（图8(b)）：

items.en: Basic: The object layout closely resembles those in the training data.
items.zh: 基础：物体布局与训练数据中的布局非常相似。

items.en: Multiple Objects: We add multiple instances of a subset of object categories into the scene. We include instructions to command the robot to put all the instances belonging to these categories into the bussing box or rubbish bin.
items.zh: 多物体：我们在场景中添加了部分物体类别的多个实例。我们包含指令，命令机器人将这些类别中的所有实例放入清理箱或垃圾桶。

items.en: Multiple Destinations: We add a woven basket into the scene and command the robot to put utensils into either the woven basket or the bussing box.
items.zh: 多目标：我们在场景中添加了一个编织篮，并命令机器人将餐具放入编织篮或清理箱。

items.en: Multiple Objects & Destinations: We combine the above two settings and instruct the robot to move all the instances of an object category to one of the two destinations.
items.zh: 多物体与多目标：我们结合上述两种设置，并指示机器人将某个物体类别的所有实例移动到两个目标之一。

items.en: Novel Destinations: The robot is required to move objects to a destination that does not appear with the object in the training data, e.g., “put the fork into the rubbish bin”.
items.zh: 新目标：机器人需要将物体移动到一个在训练数据中未与该物体一起出现的目标，例如“将叉子放入垃圾桶”。

items.en: Invalid Tasks: In real-world application, the robot needs to deal with complex instructions among which some may be invalid. For example, if there are no blue bowls on the table, “put the blue bowl into the plastic box” would be considered invalid. In such scenario, we want the policy to reject from performing wrong valid tasks [52]. In this setting, we prompt the model with tasks that can not be completed with the given observation. The trial is considered successful only if the model refrains from manipulating any objects within 10 seconds.
items.zh: 无效任务：在实际应用中，机器人需要处理复杂的指令，其中一些可能是无效的。例如，如果桌子上没有蓝色碗，则“将蓝色碗放入塑料盒”被认为是无效的。在这种情况下，我们希望策略拒绝执行错误的有效任务[52]。在此设置中，我们使用给定观察无法完成的任务提示模型。只有当模型在10秒内不操作任何物体时，试验才被视为成功。

items.capEn: Figure 9: Experiment Settings of Dexterous Cloth Manipulation. (a) Seen and unseen clothes in the test set. (b) The Basic and Position settings.
items.capZh: 图9：灵巧布料操作的实验设置。(a) 测试集中见过的和未见过的衣物。(b) 基本设置和位置设置。

items.en: In total, we collected approximately 101 hours of robot trajectories for this task. For the baseline method, we fine-tune π0\pi_{0} on these robot trajectories. For GR-3, we co-train on both the robot trajectories and vision-language (VL) data. We also perform ablation studies with two variants of our method, GR-3 w/o Norm and GR-3 w/o Task Status (TS). GR-3 w/o Norm removes the introduced RMSNorm in the attention and FFN of the DiT blocks. GR-3 w/o TS does not incorporate task status during training. For all methods, we train two separate models, a flat version and an IF version, for the two settings, respectively. For the flat version, we randomly sample between the general task and sub-tasks as the language instruction. For the IF version, we use only sub-tasks as the instruction during training.
items.zh: 总共，我们为此任务收集了约101小时的机器人轨迹。对于基线方法，我们在这些机器人轨迹上微调π₀。对于GR-3，我们在机器人轨迹和视觉语言（VL）数据上共同训练。我们还对我们的方法的两个变体进行了消融研究：GR-3 w/o Norm和GR-3 w/o Task Status (TS)。GR-3 w/o Norm移除了DiT块中注意力和FFN中引入的RMSNorm。GR-3 w/o TS在训练期间不纳入任务状态。对于所有方法，我们分别针对两种设置训练了两个独立的模型：平面版本和IF版本。对于平面版本，我们随机在通用任务和子任务之间采样作为语言指令。对于IF版本，我们在训练期间仅使用子任务作为指令。

items.en: As shown in Fig. 8(d), GR-3 outperforms π0\pi_{0} in both settings, especially in the IF setting (53.8% vs 97.5% in terms of success rate). While π0\pi_{0} is able to perform long-horizon table bussing, it struggles with instruction following, especially in out-of-distribution scenarios. It is not able to distinguish between forks and spoons. And in Novel Destinations, it puts objects into containers that appear together with the objects in the training data instead of following the given instructions. On the other hand, GR-3 strictly follows instructions in all six test sets. It generalizes well to multiple objects and destinations and is able to refain from performing wrong tasks in Invalid Tasks.
items.zh: 如图8(d)所示，GR-3在两种设置中都优于π₀，尤其是在IF设置中（成功率分别为53.8% vs 97.5%）。虽然π₀能够执行长时程的桌面清理任务，但在指令跟随方面表现不佳，尤其是在分布外场景中。它无法区分叉子和勺子。在“新目的地”任务中，它将物体放入训练数据中与物体一起出现的容器中，而不是遵循给定的指令。另一方面，GR-3在所有六个测试集中严格遵循指令。它能很好地泛化到多个物体和目的地，并且在“无效任务”中能够避免执行错误的任务。

items.en: Removing the RMSNorm hurts the performance in both settings, especially in the IF setting. GR-3 w/o Norm is not able to follow instructions well. In particular, it is not able to generalize to novel destinations. These results underscore the crucial role of RMSNorm in enhancing the instruction following capabilities. Without the task status, the IF capabilities also drop, highlighting the effectiveness of task status in aiding the VLA model to follow instructions.
items.zh: 移除RMSNorm在两种设置中都损害了性能，尤其是在IF设置中。GR-3 w/o Norm无法很好地遵循指令。特别是，它无法泛化到新的目的地。这些结果强调了RMSNorm在增强指令跟随能力中的关键作用。没有任务状态，IF能力也会下降，突出了任务状态在帮助VLA模型遵循指令方面的有效性。

items.en: In this experiment, we evaluate GR-3 on dexterous manipulation of deformable objects. In particular, we challenge the model to hang clothes onto a drying rack with cloth hangers (Fig. 2). In this task, the robot needs to 1) pick up the hanger, 2) place the clothes onto the hanger, and 3) hang the clothes on the drying rack. In the final step, the robot needs to rotate its mobile base from the table to the drying rack to hang the clothes. In total, we collected 116 hours of robot trajectories for this task. We train π0\pi_{0} on these data. For GR-3, we co-train on these robot trajectories and vision-language data. We perform evaluation under three different settings: Basic, Position, and Unseen Instances.
items.zh: 在本实验中，我们评估了GR-3在可变形物体灵巧操作上的表现。具体来说，我们挑战模型将衣物用衣架挂到晾衣架上（图2）。在此任务中，机器人需要：1）拿起衣架，2）将衣物放到衣架上，3）将衣物挂在晾衣架上。在最后一步中，机器人需要将移动基座从桌子旋转到晾衣架以挂上衣物。总共，我们为此任务收集了116小时的机器人轨迹。我们在这些数据上训练π₀。对于GR-3，我们在这些机器人轨迹和视觉语言数据上共同训练。我们在三种不同设置下进行评估：基本设置、位置设置和未见实例设置。

items.en: For Basic, we evaluate on six clothes that are seen during training. The clothes are positioned similarly as in the training data. For Position, we rotate and crumple the clothes as shown in Fig. 9(b). The Position setting evaluates the model’s robustness in handling challenging clothes layouts. In Unseen Instances, we evaluate the model’s ability to generalize to clothes that are not seen during training. Specifically, we evaluate with four unseen clothes (Fig. 9(a)). While all the clothes are long-sleeved in the training data, two of the unseen clothes in the test set are short-sleeved. We use average task progress as the evaluation metric, where a full success – hanging the shirt on the drying rack – corresponds to 1.0. The entire process is divided into four key milestones: 1) picking up the hanger, 2) placing the right shoulder on the hanger, 3) placing the left shoulder on the hanger, and 4) hanging the shirt on the drying rack (Fig. 10(a)). Each milestone contributes a fractional score towards the overall task progress.
items.zh: 对于基本设置，我们在训练期间见过的六件衣物上进行评估。衣物的位置与训练数据中相似。对于位置设置，我们旋转和揉皱衣物，如图9(b)所示。位置设置评估模型处理具有挑战性的衣物布局的鲁棒性。在未见实例设置中，我们评估模型泛化到训练期间未见过的衣物的能力。具体来说，我们使用四件未见过的衣物进行评估（图9(a)）。虽然训练数据中所有衣物都是长袖的，但测试集中有两件未见过的衣物是短袖的。我们使用平均任务进度作为评估指标，其中完全成功——将衬衫挂在晾衣架上——对应1.0。整个过程分为四个关键里程碑：1）拿起衣架，2）将右肩放在衣架上，3）将左肩放在衣架上，4）将衬衫挂在晾衣架上（图10(a)）。每个里程碑对整体任务进度贡献一个分数。

items.capEn: Figure 10: Experiment Results on Dexterous Cloth Manipulation. (a) Sankey diagram of success (solid) and failure (hatch) across entire rollouts of the Basic setting. (b) Average task progresses of π0\pi_{0} and GR-3 in the three evaluation settings.
items.capZh: 图10：灵巧布料操作的实验结果。(a) 基本设置整个 rollout 中成功（实线）和失败（阴影）的桑基图。(b) π₀和GR-3在三种评估设置中的平均任务进度。

items.en: Results are shown in Fig. 10. GR-3 outperforms π0\pi_{0} in all three evaluation settings. It achieves an average task progress of 86.7% and 83.9% in Basic and Position, respectively, showcasing its proficiency in handling complex dexterous tasks and its robustness to positional variations. Furthermore, GR-3 is able to generalize to unseen clothes with novel patterns and sleeve length, achieving an average task progress of 75.8%. To probe into the rollout process, we show the Sankey diagram of success and failure across the four milestones of the Basic setting in Fig. 10(a). The most challenging part for both model is to place the left shoulder on the hanger after the right shoulder. This is because the robot needs to pull out the left collar, which is often folded behind the hanger, for grasping while holding the hanger. Another failure mode occurs when the hanger slips away from the gripper during the course of placing the left shoulder on it, leading to failures in the last step.
items.zh: 结果如图10所示。GR-3在所有三种评估设置中都优于π₀。它在基本设置和位置设置中分别达到了86.7%和83.9%的平均任务进度，展示了其在处理复杂灵巧任务方面的熟练程度以及对位置变化的鲁棒性。此外，GR-3能够泛化到具有新颖图案和袖长的未见衣物，达到了75.8%的平均任务进度。为了探究 rollout 过程，我们在图10(a)中展示了基本设置四个里程碑的成功和失败桑基图。两个模型最具挑战性的部分是在右肩之后将左肩放在衣架上。这是因为机器人需要拉出左领口（通常折叠在衣架后面）以便在握住衣架的同时抓取。另一种失败模式发生在将左肩放在衣架上的过程中衣架从夹爪滑落，导致最后一步失败。

items.en: Building generalist manipulation policies capable of following instructions to effectively interact with the physical world has been a long-standing challenge in robotics research [10, 11, 37, 9, 29, 7, 68, 43, 44, 64, 6, 66, 3]. Prior works [53, 61, 74, 33] propose to learn representations from large-scale data for downstream policy learning, enabling more robust robot behaviors in complex tasks. Recent advancements in vision-language-action (VLA) models adopt various approaches to enhance policy generalization and improve manipulation capabilities. A popular line of works [55, 68, 37, 9, 58, 29, 18, 70, 49, 60, 41] train policies with cross-embodiment data that encompasses trajectories collected from different robot embodiments [55, 36, 17, 69, 21]. Along with the real-world robot trajectories, others [11, 9, 29] leverage pre-trained vision-language models to develop robot policies, showcasing strong capabilities in generalization to unseen settings. Another way to improve generalization is to perform future prediction on web-scale video datasets [73, 13, 28, 40, 8, 20] or learn latent actions [7, 12, 77] from action-less videos. In this work, we introduce GR-3, a VLA model that is jointly trained on both robot trajectories and vision-language data, and can be efficiently fine-tuned with few-shot human trajectories. Throughout extensive experiments, we show that GR-3 is able to 1) strictly follow instructions and generalize to novel objects, environments, and instructions, 2) efficiently adapt to novel settings from few-shot human trajectory data, and 3) perform long-horizon and dexterous tasks with high robustness.
items.zh: 构建能够遵循指令有效与物理世界交互的通用操作策略一直是机器人研究中的长期挑战[10, 11, 37, 9, 29, 7, 68, 43, 44, 64, 6, 66, 3]。先前的工作[53, 61, 74, 33]提出从大规模数据中学习表示用于下游策略学习，从而在复杂任务中实现更鲁棒的机器人行为。近期视觉-语言-动作（VLA）模型的进展采用了多种方法来增强策略泛化并提升操作能力。一系列流行的工作[55, 68, 37, 9, 58, 29, 18, 70, 49, 60, 41]使用跨具身数据训练策略，这些数据包含从不同机器人具身收集的轨迹[55, 36, 17, 69, 21]。除了真实世界机器人轨迹，其他工作[11, 9, 29]利用预训练的视觉语言模型开发机器人策略，展示了在未见设置中强大的泛化能力。另一种提升泛化的方法是在网络规模视频数据集上进行未来预测[73, 13, 28, 40, 8, 20]或从无动作视频中学习潜在动作[7, 12, 77]。在这项工作中，我们介绍了GR-3，一个在机器人轨迹和视觉语言数据上联合训练，并且可以通过少量人类轨迹高效微调的VLA模型。通过大量实验，我们展示了GR-3能够：1）严格遵循指令并泛化到新物体、环境和指令；2）从少量人类轨迹数据高效适应新设置；3）以高鲁棒性执行长时程和灵巧任务。

items.en: Collecting real-world robot trajectories is costly and time-consuming. As a result, broadening data sources becomes critical when it comes to scaling up policy training [32, 46]. A popular approach is to initialize policies from pre-trained vision encoders [53, 74, 50, 33, 61] or more recently, pre-trained vision-language models [9, 29, 11, 7]. Built upon this framework, it is natural to incorporate multi-modal data during training besides robot trajectories [63, 76, 11, 29, 58]. In particular, GATO [63] builds a generalist agent capable of performing a wide range of tasks, including image captioning and block stacking with a real robot. It converts data from different modalities into a sequence of tokens and trains a large transformer for next-token prediction. RT-2 [11] demonstrates that co-fine-tuning large vision-language models on both robot trajectories and vision-language data significantly boosts generalization. By co-training on heterogeneous data, π0.5\pi_{0.5} [29] showcases exceptional generalization across environments and objects, enabling effective deployment in real-world unseen scenarios. In this work, GR-3 adopts a similar co-training strategy. We curate a well-designed web-scale vision-language dataset from multiple data sources and perform large-scale co-training on a wide range of vision-language tasks. Through large-scale co-training, GR-3 showcases strong capabilities in zero-shot generalization to unseen objects and complex instructions that require abstract concept understanding.
items.zh: 收集真实世界机器人轨迹成本高昂且耗时。因此，在扩展策略训练时，拓宽数据源变得至关重要[32, 46]。一种流行的方法是从预训练的视觉编码器[53, 74, 50, 33, 61]或更近期从预训练的视觉语言模型[9, 29, 11, 7]初始化策略。基于此框架，在训练期间除了机器人轨迹外，纳入多模态数据是很自然的[63, 76, 11, 29, 58]。特别是，GATO[63]构建了一个通用智能体，能够执行广泛的任务，包括图像描述和真实机器人积木堆叠。它将不同模态的数据转换为token序列，并训练一个大型Transformer用于下一个词预测。RT-2[11]展示了在机器人轨迹和视觉语言数据上共同微调大型视觉语言模型显著提升了泛化能力。通过在异构数据上共同训练，π₀.₅[29]展示了跨环境和物体的卓越泛化能力，使其能够在真实世界未见场景中有效部署。在这项工作中，GR-3采用了类似的共同训练策略。我们从多个数据源策划了一个精心设计的网络规模视觉语言数据集，并在广泛的视觉语言任务上进行大规模共同训练。通过大规模共同训练，GR-3展示了在零样本泛化到未见物体和需要抽象概念理解的复杂指令方面的强大能力。

items.en: To improve data efficiency, incorporating human data into policy training has become a popular approach in robotics research. A popular line of works [51, 5, 1, 72] extract different types of representations from human videos to enhance policy training. Wu et al. [73] and Cheang et al. [13] propose to leverage large-scale human videos [24, 16, 23] for generative video pre-training. Recently, with the development of hand tracking and VR devices, Qiu et al. [59] and Kareer et al. [34] show that human videos with hand trajectories can improve policy performance on robot embodiments via co-training with a small amount of robot data. In this report, we follow this line of research and show that GR-3 can effectively adapt to novel settings through few-shot learning from human trajectories.
items.zh: 为了提高数据效率，将人类数据纳入策略训练已成为机器人研究中一种流行的方法。一系列流行的工作[51, 5, 1, 72]从人类视频中提取不同类型的表示以增强策略训练。Wu等人[73]和Cheang等人[13]提出利用大规模人类视频[24, 16, 23]进行生成式视频预训练。最近，随着手部追踪和VR设备的发展，Qiu等人[59]和Kareer等人[34]展示了带有手部轨迹的人类视频可以通过与少量机器人数据共同训练来提升机器人具身上的策略性能。在本报告中，我们遵循这一研究方向，展示了GR-3可以通过从人类轨迹中进行少样本学习有效适应新设置。

items.en: Despite the powerful performance in challenging tasks, GR-3 has limitations. While it showcases strong generalization capabilities, it makes mistakes in following unseen instructions involving novel concepts and objects, and struggles with grasping objects with unseen shapes. We plan to scale up the model and training data to continue improving the model performance on handling novel scenarios. In addition, similar to all imitation learning methods, GR-3 can be stuck in out-of-distribution states during rollouts and fails to recover from failure. In the future, we plan to incorporate reinforcement learning (RL) to strengthen robustness on complex and dexterous tasks and optimize performance beyond the limitation of imitation learning.
items.zh: 尽管在具有挑战性的任务中表现出强大的性能，GR-3仍有局限性。虽然它展示了强大的泛化能力，但在遵循涉及新概念和物体的未见指令时会出错，并且在抓取具有未见形状的物体时存在困难。我们计划扩展模型和训练数据，以继续提升模型在处理新场景方面的性能。此外，与所有模仿学习方法类似，GR-3在 rollout 过程中可能陷入分布外状态，并且无法从失败中恢复。未来，我们计划引入强化学习（RL）以增强复杂和灵巧任务的鲁棒性，并优化超越模仿学习限制的性能。

items.en: In this report, we introduce GR-3, a powerful vision-language-action (VLA) model that outputs actions to control a bi-manual mobile robot. We carefully study the model architecture and develop a comprehensive training recipe that combines co-training with large-scale vision-language data, efficient few-shot learning from human trajectories, and effective imitation learning from robot trajectories. Extensive real-world experiments on three challenging tasks showcase that GR-3 excels in understanding complex instructions with abstract concepts, generalizes effectively to novel objects and environments, learns efficiently from minimal human trajectories, and performs long-horizon and dexterous tasks with exceptional robustness and reliability. We hope GR-3 can serve as a step towards creating generalist robots capable of assisting humans with diverse tasks in the real world.
items.zh: 在本报告中，我们介绍了GR-3，一个强大的视觉-语言-动作（VLA）模型，它输出动作以控制双臂移动机器人。我们仔细研究了模型架构，并开发了一个全面的训练方案，结合了大规模视觉语言数据的共同训练、从人类轨迹的高效少样本学习以及从机器人轨迹的有效模仿学习。在三个具有挑战性任务上的大量真实世界实验表明，GR-3在理解包含抽象概念的复杂指令方面表现出色，有效泛化到新物体和环境，从最少的人类轨迹中高效学习，并以卓越的鲁棒性和可靠性执行长时程和灵巧任务。我们希望GR-3能够成为创建能够帮助人类在现实世界中完成各种任务的通用机器人的一步。
